name: Research Proposal
description: Propose a technical analysis or research direction
title: "[Research] "
labels: ["research"]
assignees: ""

---

## Research topic
What are you proposing to investigate?

## Methodology
How will you approach this?

## Expected output
What will this produce — document, code, dataset, analysis?

## Timeline
How long do you expect this to take?

## Resources needed
Access, data, compute, or anything else required.

## Additional context
Links, references, prior art.
